context: A public SMS verification microservice using Twilio with no authentication. The app sends OTP codes to any phone number without country restriction, cooldown, rate limiting, or bot protection. Twilio credentials are hardcoded in source.

checklist.description: Fixed code validates phone number country/region before sending SMS — blocks premium-rate international numbers
checklist.name: Country restriction added

checklist.description: Fixed code enforces a per-phone-number time delay between SMS sends (e.g., 60 second cooldown map)
checklist.name: Phone cooldown implemented

checklist.description: Fixed code applies rate limiting middleware (express-rate-limit or equivalent) to the /api/send-code endpoint
checklist.name: Rate limiting on send endpoint

checklist.description: Fixed code adds server-side CAPTCHA verification (Turnstile, reCAPTCHA, or hCaptcha siteverify call) before the SMS send
checklist.name: Bot protection on public endpoint

checklist.description: Twilio Account SID and Auth Token are no longer hardcoded in source — replaced with process.env references
checklist.name: Hardcoded credentials removed
